zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Shirley於1410年出生在英國德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特時，他的父親Sir Ralph Shirley19歲，母親Joan Basset21歲。他於1423年9月2日與Margaret Staunton在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1466年12月21日在英國享年56歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Shirley于1410年出生在英国德比夏爾阿希布恩 希丘特时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Shirley19岁，母亲Joan Basset21岁。他于1423年9月2日与Margaret Staunton在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1466年12月21日在英国享年56岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾布拉爾斯福德 格林。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Shirley was born in 1410, in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Shirley, was 19 and his mother, Joan Basset, was 21. He married Margaret Staunton on 2 September 1423, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 December 1466, in England, at the age of 56, and was buried in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Shirley est né en 1410, à Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Shirley, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan Basset, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Staunton le 2 septembre 1423, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 décembre 1466, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Brailsford, Derbyshire Dales District, D: Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Shirley 1410 in Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Shirley 19 und seine Mutter Joan Basset 21. Er hat am 2. September 1423 in Leicestershire, England Margaret Staunton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 21. Dezember 1466 im Alter von 56 Jahren in England und wurde in Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Shirley è nato il nel 1410 nel Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Shirley, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joan Basset, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Staunton il 2 settembre 1423, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 21 dicembre 1466, nel England, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Shirleyが1410年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアシュボウルン シルクウイトで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Shirleyは19歳，母Joan Bassetは21歳であった。1423年9月2日にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでMargaret Stauntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1466年12月21日にイギリスで56歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアブレイルスフォード グレンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Shirley(이)가 1410년 영국 더비실르 애스h보우른 시르c이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Shirley(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Basset(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1423년 9월 2일 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Margaret Staunton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1466년 12월 21일 영국에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 브레이스퍼드 그린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Shirley nasceu em 1410, em Ashbourne Circuit, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Shirley, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan Basset, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Staunton em 2 de setembro de 1423, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 21 de dezembro de 1466, em Inglaterra, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Brailsford Green, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Shirley родился в 1410 г. в местности ашбурн сиркуит, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Shirley было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Basset, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Staunton 2 сентября 1423 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 декабря 1466 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности бреилсфорд грин, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.
